signals.headline: **Strategies for mispriced/lagging markets:** Traders emphasize EV calcs (buy if your prob > price), Kelly sizing (5-10%
signals.raw: **Strategies for mispriced/lagging markets:** Traders emphasize EV calcs (buy if your prob > price), Kelly sizing (5-10% bankroll), Bayesian updates, and spotting "stuck" prices via Markov chains—top performers exploit before repricing.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2045155603517948326)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2045073200392945855)
